subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant and firm in His Testament! The mathematicians of old, even as the stars of heaven, divided [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان میثاق و راسخان پیمان ریاضیون سلف چون نجوم آسمانرا تقسیم نمودند در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @firmness in the Covenant
